name: mind-voyage-companion
description: Next.js 15 + TypeScript + MongoDB boilerplate with authentication, testing, and Azure CI/CD ready

scripts.db:cleanup: echo 'Cleaning up MongoDB processes...' && pkill -f mongod || true
scripts.generate:secrets:
node -e "const crypto = require('crypto'); const jwtSecret = crypto.randomBytes(48).toString('base64url'); const nextAuthSecret = crypto.randomBytes(48).toString('base64url'); console.log('
🔐 Generated Secure Secrets:'); console.log('─'.repeat(60)); console.log('JWT_SECRET:'); console.log('  ' + jwtSecret); console.log('  Length: ' + jwtSecret.length + ' characters ✅'); console.log('
NEXTAUTH_SECRET:'); console.log('  ' + nextAuthSecret); console.log('  Length: ' + nextAuthSecret.length + ' characters ✅'); console.log('
📋 Copy to .env.local:'); console.log('JWT_SECRET=' + jwtSecret); console.log('NEXTAUTH_SECRET=' + nextAuthSecret); console.log('
✅ Secrets generated successfully!')"
scripts.prepare: node -e "if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && process.env.CI !== 'true') { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('husky', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { console.log('Skipping husky setup'); } }"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') { const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('husky install', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { console.log('Skipping husky install'); } }"

author: Your Team Name
